title: Hubs gain named roles, an index engine, and hub-to-hub subscription
summary: One hub binary now runs as named roles (personal, demo, community, index, registry, gateway) selected with --role. The index role rebuilds a deterministic public atproto index from source; gateway hubs mirror other hubs' public Spaces over the existing sync protocol; every hub gets a persistent system identity on /health; and a compose template runs a hub beside the official AT Protocol PDS behind one domain.
